name: Earthshaker
description: There may be many earths, but there's only one Earthshaker.

abilities.name: Slugger
abilities.description: Turns enemy heroes killed into projectiles that travel in a straight line from its origin position, and deals damage to all enemy units it passes through. Max Travel Distance: 1200. Projectile Width: 175. Impact Radius: 225. Damage: 135. Hero Damage: 15.

abilities.name: Fissure
abilities.description: Whenever Earthshaker casts an ability, Aftershock of its corresponding level is released along the Fissure path that stuns for a shorter duration. Cast Range: 1600 (1800). Fissure Length: 1600 (1800). Damage Radius: 225. Stun Radius: 225. Damage: 100/160/220/280 (175/235/295/355). Stun Duration: 1/1.2/1.4/1.6. Cooldown: 18/17/16/15. Mana Cost: 115/120/125/130.

abilities.name: Enchant Totem
abilities.description: Empowers Earthshaker's totem, causing it to deal extra damage and grants bonus attack range on the next attack. Attack Range Bonus: 100. Attack Damage Bonus: 100%/200%/300%/400% (165%/265%/365%/465%). Duration: 14. Attack Count: 1. Cast Range: 950. Leap Duration: (0.8). Cooldown: 45/55/65/75.

abilities.name: Aftershock
abilities.description: Causes the earth to shake underfoot, adding additional damage and stuns to nearby enemy units when Earthshaker casts his abilities. Radius: 350. Proc Damage: 65/90/115/140 (115/140/165/190). Stun Duration: 1/1.1/1.2/1.3.

abilities.name: Echo Slam
abilities.description: Creates shockwaves that travel through the ground, damaging enemy units. Affected enemy heroes releases two echos. First Search Radius: 700. Echo Search Radius: 700. Base Damage: 100/140/180. Echo Damage: 70/90/110 (120/140/160). Cooldown: 130/120/110. Mana Cost: 150/200/250.
